privileged_info_summary: OSCAR is a real, open-source Electronic Medical Records system originally developed at McMaster University and used in medical offices. This task uses OSCAR in a Docker-based test environment with a MariaDB database. All patient data is synthetic: Maria Santos (demographic_no 2) is a test patient created by the setup script; provider Dr. Sarah Chen (provider_no 999998) is a test provider. The task involves rescheduling an initial appointment from July 15, 2025 at 10:00 AM to July 17, 2025 at 2:00 PM (14:00) and changing the reason to 'Blood Pressure Check'. Test credentials are hardcoded (username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117). No real patient data is involved.
